title: cienfuegosia sulphurea
intro: Cienfuegosia sulphurea, also known as Mexican flame or desert fireweed, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, characterized by its vibrant orange or yellow flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cienfuegosia sulphurea include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Cienfuegosia sulphurea can be made into teas, salves, and tinctures, allowing for a variety of uses in natural medicine.
